workflows.title: Create a component
workflows.description: Walks a user through creating their first reusable component.

steps.title: Open the Components page
steps.say: This is where you manage every reusable component used in your quotes.

steps.title: Start a new component
steps.say: Click "+ Add Component" to begin. Components are the building blocks of every quote.

steps.title: Name the component
steps.say: Give it a recognisable name, e.g. "Roofing Iron" or "Building Paper".

steps.title: Choose the component type
steps.say: Pick "Main Component" for core materials, or "Extra" for one-off items.

steps.title: Choose the measurement type
steps.say: How is it measured — area, lineal, quantity, or fixed?

steps.title: Set the material rate
steps.say: Enter the price per unit so quotes auto-calculate material totals.

steps.title: Save the component
steps.say: Save it to your library. You can edit it any time.
